item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Dark Knight's Journey II
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned dark knight─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level dark knight to 70 and complete all job quests up through “Our Compromise.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
